scripts.dev:web: cd web-portal && PORT=3000 npm run dev
scripts.dev: npx kill-port 3000 3001 3002 8000 && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && rm -rf build dist && venv/bin/pyinstaller --onedir --name darsak-backend-run --hidden-import=uvicorn.logging --hidden-import=uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols.http.auto run.py
